This is one of the worst banking apps I have ever used. I can't log in properly because the app takes an extremely long time to load—sometimes almost one hour. Even when it finally opens, sending money either from the bank or to mobile numbers is a serious problem. Transactions fail, hang, or do not go through at all. It should be reliable, fast, and easy to use, but this app fails in all these basic areas. Please fix the login issues and transaction delays because the app is not usable at all.

App has been so buggy after that major update. I wonder how and why they haven't realized. Out of nowhere biometric data has been cleared and you have to set it up again. As of the date of this writing, the app doesn't allow you to login. have to clear cache and sometimes even with that, it doesn't work. cleared data, and then tried to login again, just getting errors. You wonder if these developers even test the products before getting them mainstream😐

I’m unable to make three or more transactions at once, which is really frustrating. Whenever I try to send money, the app often shows an error or becomes unresponsive. I was a fan of the old app. uncluttered. quick. this new one is unreliable. it has left me stranded many, many times. it is laggy, it is slow, it is overburdened and cannot navigate smoothly between what it offers I never pull it out when I need it now - I depend on my other bank Apps fix it. have you managers on it - using it - and fix it. use the products you offer.

Not smooth at all. First, the App itself is great when logged in and using it, but the fact that I can't use it unless I switch to Mobile Data is annoying. It keeps crashing when I switch to my WiFi or when I try to long in using my WiFi. Secondly, it would be good to use biometrics for the transactions themselves not just for logging in. Third, it keeps popping up and prompting you to log in if you don't close it from the background. The App needs some work to be as smooth as the old App.

When the app works, it's really great, but there are times it just doesn't even get past the login. It just keeps crashing. Checked for updates, I'm up to date and even reinstalled the app and same behaviour. Please fix this as you can be in a pinch and unable to access anything because of the unscheduled downtimes... update on 18/8, app is now crashing constantly, can't even get past login. Had to use ussd to do anything on my account for several days now 29/8 crashes all the time now!!!

The app has crashed multiple times since I updated it to this new version. It also apparently only works when you're using mobile data which I find frustrating since I use the app frequently and honestly see this as a nuisance. And yes I've logged in before so I don't know why it's not working anymore. All that aside the update is nice and generally a massive upgrade from the previous one.

Why is it that we have an option of creating savings account from the app but its not being processed? I have tried many times creating saving account from my personal account and its not going through. I was advised to create a different saving account so that I can transfer money to that account. What is the essence of having savings account in the app if its not useful?
